description:
Welcome to the channel!
I’m Jessica, a 500-hour certified yoga instructor with a passion for wellness and mindful movement. I’m here to support you in your yoga practice and help you find more balance, on and off the mat.

On this channel, you’ll find a variety of classes in different styles, lengths, and levels, plus the occasional vlog or sit-down chat.

If you enjoy practicing with me and want access to 700+ exclusive yoga classes, meditations, and full-length courses, check out my app Jess Yoga—available worldwide on iOS and Android (link below).

Thank you for being here. I’m so grateful to practice with you. See you on the mat! 🤍

For business inquiries/collaborations, please email: richburg.jessica@gmail.com
niche: 500-hour certified yoga instructor — mindful movement and balance
angle_to_take: Jess Yoga (918K, US) teaches across multiple class lengths/styles. Frame a branded app: time-filtered class picker (10/20/45 min) + program tracks (back-care, beginner, hips) + on-mat streak gamification — turns YT casual viewers into paying members with progression they can see.

description:
Welcome to my channel! I'm Maris Aylward. Yoga Upload is your online guide to skillful and nurturing practice to help you thrive in daily life. Here you'll find:
🔸Vinyasa Flow & Power Yoga (for intermediate and strong beginners)
🔸Wrist-Free & Hands-Free Yoga Flow (if you have pain/injury in wrists/shoulders & can't put weight on your arms)
🔸Gentle Stretch, Deep Stretch/Yin, Morning/Bedtime Yoga (for all levels)

Join my growing community on YOGA UPLOAD PLUS - my online membership and yoga app:
 🔸 Yoga Programs & Challenges
 🔸 Download Videos for Offline Viewing
 🔸 Exclusive Videos

Maris Aylward (born Dimayuga) is a Filipina actress, TV host, and yoga teacher (RYT-500). In 2010, she moved to the U.S. and started her yoga teaching career in Kansas City. She was also a TV Host at Kansas City PBS for 3 years. Maris now lives in Portland, Oregon with her husband David and their two children.
niche: Vinyasa Flow + Power Yoga + Wrist-Free options (skillful + nurturing approach)
angle_to_take: Maris (116K, US) already runs yogauploadplus.com on Mailchimp + Stripe — split tools. Frame a branded app that consolidates the funnel: program library + Mailchimp-replacing in-app drips + Stripe inside the app for subscriptions — one stack instead of three, with native push notifications she doesn't currently get.

description:
Kostenloses Yoga auf Deutsch für Anfänger, Mittelstufe & Fortgeschrittene. Hier findest du Vinyasa Flows für mehr Kraft, Flexibilität und Entspannung. 

Ich bin Verena Leuze, zertifizierte Yogalehrerin. Mein Kanal bietet dir eine umfassende Praxis für deine körperliche und mentale Gesundheit:
- Kraft & Ausdauer: Power und Vinyasa Yoga Flows
- Balance & Ruhe: Yin Yoga, sanfte Flows, Meditation und Pranayama
- Linderung: Gezieltes Yoga bei Rücken-, Nacken- und Verspannungsschmerzen
- Kostenlose Yogapläne und Challenges

Egal ob du nur 5 Minuten Zeit hast oder eine 100-minütige Masterclass suchst – hier baust du nachhaltig Kraft auf und reduzierst Stress.
Abonniere jetzt den Kanal, um kein neues Video und keinen Monatsplan zu verpassen.

Wir sehen uns auf der Matte,
Deine Verena 🧡

- Bitte höre auf deinen Körper. Bei gesundheitlichen Problemen konsultiere vor dem Üben einen Arzt. Die Teilnahme erfolgt auf eigene Gefahr - 

📩  Kontakt & Kooperationen: mail@verenaleuze.de
niche: German Vinyasa-flow yoga for beginners through advanced
angle_to_take: Verena Leuze (70.5K, DE) covers all levels in German. Frame a branded German-first yoga app: leveled progression paths + body-region focus filters + offline downloads — fills the gap left by English-default yoga apps for the German-speaking audience.

description:
Yin Yoga with Matt is a youtube channel dedicated to the practice of Yin Yoga. Return your physical, mental, and emotional selves to balance through yin yoga and its calming, healing approach. Used by athletes, Hollywood actors, military and law enforcement personnel, cyclists, Olympic runners, and many more; discover the benefits of this practice and start balancing your life today.
 
Yin yoga offers a remedy to the stress and hustle of your busy yang life. By concentrating on restorative poses that target your deeper fascia and connective tissues, you’ll experience increased flexibility and improved joint health. Yin yoga also focuses on deep breathing and longer hold times, allowing you the time and space to clear your mind and enhance your mental acuity. These meditative poses will help you attain a renewed sense of mindfulness and physical well-being, making them the perfect complement to an active yang lifestyle and helping bring you back into balance. Yin is truly healing!
niche: Yin Yoga authority — physical/mental/emotional balance, athlete + Hollywood + military audience
segment_original: US Yin Yoga niche teacher (Yin Yoga with Matt, 14.2K)
angle_to_take: Matt (14.2K, US) already sells a membership on yinyogawithmatt.com (WordPress). Frame a branded app: Yin-only sequence library + long-hold pose timer + recovery-focused programs for athletes — moves a small loyal audience from a WordPress paywall into a polished native app they pay more for.
